dependencies.name: hyperliquid-python-sdk
dependencies.usage: API pattern reference for POST JSON to Hyperliquid Info endpoint
dependencies.provenance: Adapted — uses same Info API endpoint, no SDK dependency

dependencies.name: ccxt
dependencies.usage: API pattern reference for Binance public ticker endpoint
dependencies.provenance: Adapted — uses raw HTTP to Binance, no ccxt dependency

dependencies.name: kittycapital/hyperliquid-whales
dependencies.usage: Concept reference for whale position tracking patterns
dependencies.provenance: Concept reference only — no code copied. Uses same public Info API.

dependency_pinning.method: None — all dependencies are stdlib (json, sqlite3, urllib, csv, os, etc.)
dependency_pinning.notes: No pip packages required beyond pandas and requests (existing project deps). MVP+ workbench runs entirely on Python standard library.

license_compliance.status: All dependencies are MIT or PSF-licensed. No copyleft dependencies.
license_compliance.risk: None identified — all public APIs are free and read-only.
